728: function toReviewRunResponse(record: ReviewRunRecord): ReviewRunResponse {
729:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
730:   const report = parseJsonOrFallback(record.report_json, null) as ReviewReport | null;
731:   const reportHasProvenance = Boolean(report?.provenance);
732: 
733:   const response: ReviewRunResponse = {
734:     id: record.id,
735:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
736:     deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
737:     target: {
738:       type: record.target_type,
739:       workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
740:       deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
741:     },
742:     mode: record.mode,
743:     status: record.status,
744:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
745:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
746:     startedAt: record.started_at,
747:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
748:     createdAt: record.created_at,
749:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
750:     findings: toReviewFindingRecord(report?.findings),
751:     evidence: Array.isArray(report?.evidence) ? report.evidence : [],
752:     provenance: {
753:       sessionIds:
754:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.sessionIds) ? report.provenance.sessionIds : [],
755:       promptSummary:
756:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.promptSummary === 'string'
757:           ? report.provenance.promptSummary
758:           : !reportHasProvenance && typeof (provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary === 'string'
759:             ? ((provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary as string)
760:             : null,
761:       transcriptUrl:
762:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.transcriptUrl === 'string'
763:           ? report.provenance.transcriptUrl
764:           : null,
765:       reviewContextRef:
766:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextRef && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextRef === 'object'
767:           ? (report.provenance.reviewContextRef as ReviewContextRef)
768:           : null,
769:       reviewContextStats:
770:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextStats && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextStats === 'object'
771:           ? report.provenance.reviewContextStats
772:           : undefined,
773:       coChange:
774:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.coChange && typeof report.provenance.coChange === 'object'
775:           ? report.provenance.coChange
776:           : undefined,
777:       contextResolution:
778:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.contextResolution && typeof report.provenance.contextResolution === 'object'
779:           ? report.provenance.contextResolution
780:           : undefined,
781:       outputSchemaVersion: report?.provenance?.outputSchemaVersion,
782:       passArchitecture: report?.provenance?.passArchitecture,
783:       validation:
784:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.validation && typeof report.provenance.validation === 'object'
785:           ? report.provenance.validation
786:           : undefined,
787:       furtherPassesLowYield:
788:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.furtherPassesLowYield && typeof report.provenance.furtherPassesLowYield === 'object'
789:           ? report.provenance.furtherPassesLowYield
790:           : undefined,
791:       advisories:
792:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.advisories)
793:           ? report.provenance.advisories.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === 'string')
794:           : undefined,
795:     },
796:     markdownSummary: record.markdown_summary,
797:   };
798: 
799:   if (report?.summary) {
800:     response.summary = report.summary;
801:   }
802:   if (typeof report?.summaryText === 'string') {
803:     response.summaryText = report.summaryText;
804:   }
805:   if (typeof report?.furtherPassesLowYield === 'boolean') {
806:     response.furtherPassesLowYield = report.furtherPassesLowYield;
807:   }
808:   if (report?.intent) {
809:     response.intent = report.intent;
810:   }
811:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
812:     response.error = {
813:       code: record.error_code,
814:       message: record.error_message,
815:     };
816:   }
817: 
818:   return response;
819: }

821: /**
822:  * Create a new checkpoint job in the database
823:  */
824: export async function createCheckpointJob(
825:   db: D1Database,
826:   input: CreateCheckpointJobInput
827: ): Promise<JobResponse> {
828:   const result = await db
829:     .prepare(
830:       `INSERT INTO jobs (
831:          id,
832:          prompt,
833:          model,
834:          status,
835:          phase,
836:          source_type,
837:          checkpoint_id,
838:          commit_sha,
839:          source_ref,
840:          source_project_root,
841:          build_run_tests_if_present,
842:          build_run_lint_if_present,
843:          source_bundle_key,
844:          source_bundle_sha256,
845:          source_bundle_bytes
846:        )
847:        VALUES (?, ?, 'checkpoint', 'queued', 'queued', 'checkpoint', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
848:        RETURNING *`
849:     )
850:     .bind(
851:       input.id,
852:       input.prompt,
853:       input.checkpointId,
854:       input.commitSha,
855:       input.sourceRef ?? null,
856:       input.sourceProjectRoot ?? null,
857:       input.buildRunTestsIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
858:       input.buildRunLintIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
859:       input.sourceBundleKey,
860:       input.sourceBundleSha256,
861:       input.sourceBundleBytes
862:     )
863:     .first<JobRecord>();
864: 
865:   if (!result) {
866:     throw new Error('Failed to create checkpoint job');
867:   }
868: 
869:   return toJobResponse(result);
870: }

907: /**
908:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
909:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
910:  */
911: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
912:   const result = await db
913:     .prepare(
914:       `UPDATE jobs
915:        SET status = 'running',
916:            phase = 'building',
917:            started_at = ?,
918:            error_message = NULL,
919:            error_code = NULL
920:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
921:     )
922:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
923:     .run();
924: 
925:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);
926:   return changes > 0;
927: }

929: /**
930:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
931:  */
932: export async function appendJobEvent(
933:   db: D1Database,
934:   input: {
935:     jobId: string;
936:     attemptNo?: number;
937:     eventType: string;
938:     phase: JobPhase;
939:     payload: unknown;
940:   }
941: ): Promise<number> {
942:   const sequenceResult = await db
943:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
944:     .bind(input.jobId)
945:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
946: 
947:   if (!sequenceResult) {
948:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
949:   }
950: 
951:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
952:   await db
953:     .prepare(

964:     )

1008: /**

1015:   additionalFields?: {
1016:     phase?: JobPhase;
1017:     started_at?: string | null;
1018:     completed_at?: string | null;
1019:     cancel_requested_at?: string | null;
1020:     cancelled_at?: string | null;
1021:     preview_url?: string;
1022:     deployed_url?: string;
1023:     code_url?: string;
1024:     code_zip_url?: string;
1025:     error_message?: string | null;
1026:     error_code?: string | null;
1027:     retry_count?: number;
1028:     file_count?: number;
1029:     // Metrics fields
1030:     prompt_tokens?: number;
1031:     completion_tokens?: number;
1032:     total_tokens?: number;
1033:     cost?: number;
1034:     llm_latency_ms?: number;
1035:     install_duration_ms?: number;
1036:     build_duration_ms?: number;
1037:     deploy_duration_ms?: number;
1038:     total_duration_ms?: number;
1039:     lines_of_code?: number;
1040:   }
1041: ): Promise<void> {
1042:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?'];
1043:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status];
1044: 
1045:   if (additionalFields) {
1046:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
1047:       updates.push('phase = ?');
1048:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
1049:     }
1050:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {
1051:       updates.push('started_at = ?');
1052:       values.push(additionalFields.started_at);

1054:     if (additionalFields.completed_at !== undefined) {
1055:       updates.push('completed_at = ?');
1056:       values.push(additionalFields.completed_at);
1057:     }
1058:     if (additionalFields.cancel_requested_at !== undefined) {
1059:       updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
1060:       values.push(additionalFields.cancel_requested_at);
1061:     }
1062:     if (additionalFields.cancelled_at !== undefined) {
1063:       updates.push('cancelled_at = ?');
1064:       values.push(additionalFields.cancelled_at);
1065:     }
1066:     if (additionalFields.preview_url !== undefined) {
1067:       updates.push('preview_url = ?');
1068:       values.push(additionalFields.preview_url);
1069:     }
1070:     if (additionalFields.deployed_url !== undefined) {
1071:       updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
1072:       values.push(additionalFields.deployed_url);
1073:     }
1074:     if (additionalFields.code_url !== undefined) {
1075:       updates.push('code_url = ?');
1076:       values.push(additionalFields.code_url);
1077:     }
1078:     if (additionalFields.code_zip_url !== undefined) {
1079:       updates.push('code_zip_url = ?');
1080:       values.push(additionalFields.code_zip_url);
1081:     }
1082:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1083:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1084:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1085:     }
1086:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1087:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1088:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1089:     }
1090:     if (additionalFields.retry_count !== undefined) {
1091:       updates.push('retry_count = ?');
1092:       values.push(additionalFields.retry_count);
1093:     }
1094:     if (additionalFields.file_count !== undefined) {
1095:       updates.push('file_count = ?');
1096:       values.push(additionalFields.file_count);
1097:     }
1098:     // Metrics fields
1099:     if (additionalFields.prompt_tokens !== undefined) {
1100:       updates.push('prompt_tokens = ?');
1101:       values.push(additionalFields.prompt_tokens);
1102:     }
1103:     if (additionalFields.completion_tokens !== undefined) {
1104:       updates.push('completion_tokens = ?');
1105:       values.push(additionalFields.completion_tokens);
1106:     }
1107:     if (additionalFields.total_tokens !== undefined) {
1108:       updates.push('total_tokens = ?');
1109:       values.push(additionalFields.total_tokens);
1110:     }
1111:     if (additionalFields.cost !== undefined) {
1112:       updates.push('cost = ?');
1113:       values.push(additionalFields.cost);
1114:     }
1115:     if (additionalFields.llm_latency_ms !== undefined) {
1116:       updates.push('llm_latency_ms = ?');
1117:       values.push(additionalFields.llm_latency_ms);

1134:     }
1135:     if (additionalFields.lines_of_code !== undefined) {
1136:       updates.push('lines_of_code = ?');
1137:       values.push(additionalFields.lines_of_code);
1138:     }
1139:   }
1140: 
1141:   values.push(id);
1142:

1227:   id: string,
1228:   status: WorkspaceStatus,
1229:   additionalFields?: {
1230:     baseline_ready?: number;
1231:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1232:     error_code?: string | null;
1233:     error_message?: string | null;
1234:   },
1235:   options?: {
1236:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1237:   }
1238: ): Promise<boolean> {
1239:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1240:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1241: 
1242:   if (additionalFields) {
1243:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1244:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1245:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1246:     }
1247:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1248:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1249:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1250:     }
1251:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1252:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1253:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1254:     }
1255:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1256:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1257:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1258:     }
1259:   }
1260: 
1261:   values.push(id);
1262: 
1263:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1264:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1265:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1266:   }
1267: 
1268:   const result = await db
1269:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1270:     .bind(...values)
1271:     .run();
1272: 
1273:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1274: }

1323: /**

1326: export async function appendWorkspaceEvent(

1328:   input: {
1329:     workspaceId: string;

1331:     payload: unknown;

1336:     .bind(input.workspaceId)
1337:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
1338: 
1339:   if (!sequenceResult) {

1341:   }

1343:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
1344:   await db
1345:     .prepare(
1346:       `INSERT INTO workspace_events (workspace_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
1347:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
1348:     )
1349:     .bind(input.workspaceId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
1350:     .run();
1351: 
1352:   return seq;
1353: }

1392: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1393:   db: D1Database,
1394:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1395: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1396:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1397:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1398:     .prepare(
1399:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1400:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1401:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1402:        LIMIT 1`
1403:     )
1404:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1405:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1406: 
1407:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1408:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1409:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1410:     }
1411: 
1412:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1413:     if (!existingOperation) {
1414:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1415:     }
1416:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1417:   }
1418: 
1419:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1420:     await db
1421:       .prepare(
1422:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1423:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1424:       )
1425:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1426:       .run();
1427:   }
1428: 
1429:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1430:   const operationId = input.id;
1431: 
1432:   const operationRecord = await db
1433:     .prepare(
1434:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1435:          id,
1436:          workspace_id,
1437:          type,
1438:          status,
1439:          actor_id,
1440:          auth_principal_json,
1441:          request_payload_json,
1442:          request_payload_sha256,
1443:          idempotency_key,
1444:          warnings_json
1445:        )
1446:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1447:        RETURNING *`
1448:     )
1449:     .bind(
1450:       operationId,
1451:       input.workspaceId,
1452:       input.type,
1453:       input.actorId ?? null,
1454:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1455:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1456:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1457:       input.idempotencyKey
1458:     )
1459:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1460: 
1461:   if (!operationRecord) {
1462:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1463:   }
1464: 
1465:   try {
1466:     await db
1467:       .prepare(
1468:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1469:            id,
1470:            workspace_id,
1471:            operation_type,
1472:            idempotency_key,
1473:            operation_id,
1474:            request_payload_sha256,
1475:            expires_at
1476:          )
1477:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1478:       )
1479:       .bind(
1480:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1481:         input.workspaceId,
1482:         input.type,
1483:         input.idempotencyKey,
1484:         operationId,
1485:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1486:         expiresAt
1487:       )
1488:       .run();
1489:   } catch (error) {
1490:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1491:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1492:       throw error;
1493:     }
1494: 
1495:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1496:       .prepare(
1497:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1498:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1499:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1500:          LIMIT 1`
1501:       )
1502:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1503:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1504: 
1505:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1506:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1507:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1508:     }
1509:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1510:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1511:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1512:     }
1513: 
1514:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1515:     if (!existingOperation) {
1516:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1517:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1518:     }
1519:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1520:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1521:   }
1522: 
1523:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1524: }
1525: 
1526: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1527:   db: D1Database,
1528:   workspaceId: string,
1529:   operationId: string
1530: ): Promise<WorkspaceOperationResponse | null> {
1531:   const result = await db
1532:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ?')
1533:     .bind(operationId, workspaceId)
1534:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1535: 
1536:   if (!result) {
1537:     return null;
1538:   }
1539: 
1540:   return toWorkspaceOperationResponse(result);
1541: }

1543: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1544:   db: D1Database,
1545:   workspaceId: string,
1546:   operationId: string
1547: ): Promise<boolean> {
1548:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1549:   const result = await db
1550:     .prepare(
1551:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1552:        SET status = 'running',
1553:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1554:            updated_at = ?
1555:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1556:     )
1557:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1558:     .run();
1559: 
1560:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1561: }
1562: 
1563: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1564:   db: D1Database,
1565:   operationId: string,
1566:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1567:   options?: {
1568:     result?: unknown;
1569:     warnings?: unknown[];
1570:     errorCode?: string | null;
1571:     errorClass?: string | null;
1572:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1573:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1574:     startedAt?: string | null;
1575:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1576:   }
1577: ): Promise<void> {
1578:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1579:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1580: 
1581:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1582:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1583:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1584:   }
1585:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1586:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1587:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1588:   }
1589:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1590:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1591:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1592:   }
1593:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1594:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');

1874: export async function runReviewInlineWithRetries(
1875:   env: Env,
1876:   reviewId: string,
1877:   maxCycles = 4,
1878:   options?: ReviewRunExecutionOptions
1879: ): Promise<void> {
1880:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
1881:     try {
1882:       await processReviewRun(env, reviewId, options);
1883:     } catch {
1884:       // Retry scheduling is inferred from persisted status.
1885:     }
1886: 
1887:     const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1888:     if (!latest) {
1889:       return;
1890:     }
1891:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1892:       return;
1893:     }
1894:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1895:       return;
1896:     }
1897:   }
1898: 
1899:   const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1900:   if (latest?.status === 'queued' && latest.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled') {
1901:     const message = `Review ${reviewId} remained queued after inline retries`;
1902:     await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, []);
1903:     await updateReviewRunStatus(env.DB, reviewId, 'failed', {
1904:       report: null,
1905:       markdownSummary: null,
1906:       errorCode: 'review_execution_failed',
1907:       errorMessage: message,
1908:     });
1909:     await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
1910:       reviewId,
1911:       eventType: 'review_failed',
1912:       payload: {
1913:         code: 'review_execution_failed',
1914:         message,
1915:       },
1916:     });
1917:   }
1918: }
1919: 
1920: export function shouldRetryReviewError(error: unknown): boolean {
1921:   if (error instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1922:     return true;
1923:   }
1924: 
1925:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1926:   return transientReviewFailure(message);
1927: }

26:   return rows
27:     .map((row) => (typeof row.name === 'string' ? row.name : null))
28:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
29: }
30: 
31: async function tableExists(env: Env, tableName: string): Promise<boolean> {
32:   const record = await env.DB.prepare('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = ? AND name = ? LIMIT 1')
33:     .bind('table', tableName)
34:     .first<{ name: string }>();
35:   return Boolean(record?.name);
36: }
37: 
38: export async function handleGetDeployReadiness(env: Env): Promise<Response> {
39:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
40: 
41:   checks.push({
42:     code: 'queue_binding_workspace_deploys',
43:     ok: Boolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE),
44:     details: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'binding detected' : 'WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE binding missing',
45:   });
46: 
47:   const deploymentsColumns = await getTableColumns(env, 'workspace_deployments');
48:   const requiredDeploymentColumns = [
49:     'toolchain_json',
50:     'dependency_cache_key',
51:     'dependency_cache_hit',
52:     'remediations_json',
53:   ];
54:   const missingDeploymentColumns = requiredDeploymentColumns.filter((column) => !deploymentsColumns.includes(column));
55:   checks.push({
56:     code: 'migration_workspace_deployments_0008',
57:     ok: missingDeploymentColumns.length === 0,
58:     details:
59:       missingDeploymentColumns.length === 0
60:         ? 'all phase 6 columns present'
61:         : `missing columns: ${missingDeploymentColumns.join(', ')}`,
62:   });
63: 
64:   const dependencyCacheTableExists = await tableExists(env, 'workspace_dependency_caches');
65:   checks.push({
66:     code: 'migration_workspace_dependency_caches_0008',
67:     ok: dependencyCacheTableExists,
68:     details: dependencyCacheTableExists ? 'table exists' : 'workspace_dependency_caches table is missing',
69:   });
70: 
71:   const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
72:   checks.push({
73:     code: 'runtime_flag_workspace_deploy_enabled',
74:     ok: flags.workspaceDeployEnabled,
75:     details: flags.workspaceDeployEnabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled',
76:   });
77: 
78:   const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
79:   if (providerConfigError) {
80:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: providerConfigError });
81:     return jsonResponse({
82:       ok: checks.every((check) => check.ok),
83:       checks,
84:     });
85:   }
86: 
87:   const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(undefined, env);
88:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_deploy_provider', ok: true, details: provider });
89:   try {
90:     const providerChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
91:     checks.push(...providerChecks);
92:   } catch (error) {
93:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
94:     checks.push({ code: providerError.code, ok: false, details: providerError.message });
95:   }
96: 
97:   return jsonResponse({
98:     ok: checks.every((check) => check.ok),
99:     checks,
100:   });
101: }
102: 
103: export async function handleGetReviewReadiness(env: Env): Promise<Response> {
104:   const hasWorkerGithubToken = typeof env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN === 'string' && env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN.trim().length > 0;
105:   const checks = [
106:     {
107:       code: 'review_context_github_token_configured',
108:       ok: hasWorkerGithubToken,
109:       details: hasWorkerGithubToken ? 'configured' : 'missing',
110:     },
111:   ];
112: 
113:   return jsonResponse({
114:     ok: checks.every((check) => check.ok),
115:     checks,
116:   });
117: }

(End of file - total 117 lines)
</content>
state.title: packages/worker/src/api/system.ts

parts.text:
- **Medium — readiness endpoint now gives false positives for review availability**
  - `handleCreateReview` now hard-requires both `REVIEWS_QUEUE` and `ReviewRunner` (`packages/worker/src/api/reviews.ts:480`), but `handleGetReviewReadiness` still only checks `REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN` (`packages/worker/src/api/system.ts:103`).
  - In environments missing the new Durable Object binding (or queue binding), `/api/system/review-readiness` can return `ok: true` while `POST /api/reviews` returns `503 review_runner_unavailable`.
  - This matters when readiness is used for deployment gates/alerts: the service reports healthy but cannot accept review requests.
  - Suggested fix: add checks for `env.REVIEWS_QUEUE` and `env.ReviewRunner` to `handleGetReviewReadiness`, and include failure details similar to deploy readiness checks.
